title: NULL cannot automatically be casted to every other type
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Entry');
SELECT id, name FROM test_table UNION SELECT NULL, NULL;
CREATE TABLE another_table (value REAL, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO another_table (value, description) VALUES (NULL, 'Null Value Test');
key_bug_features: NULL casting issue in union queries
